seo.title: Support Request | PolarisDX
seo.description: Having trouble with your Igloo Reader or test kits? Send us a support request and we will assist you as quickly as possible.

support.intro: If you're having trouble with your Igloo Reader or test kits, please reach out using this form. We value your message and will do our best to assist you as quickly as possible. Include a short description of the issue and, if possible, a photo and the device's serial number.

form.name: Your Name
form.udi_help: You can find the Unique Identification Number of the reader on a sticker on the bottom of the device, or on the # Home screen → ⚙ Settings → ⓘ About, or in Device settings of Dx Care or Dx Studio when reader connected to desktop app with USB.
form.sw_version_help: You can find the Software Version of the reader in # Home screen → ⚙ Settings → ⓘ About, or in Device settings of Dx Care or Dx Studio when reader connected to desktop app with USB.
form.subject: Issue Subject
form.description_placeholder: Describe the issue in as much detail as possible...
form.consent: I agree that my information will be stored for up to 12 months for processing the support request and follow-up inquiries.
form.success: Thank you! Your support request has been sent. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
form.error: An error occurred. Please try again later.

info.title: Support Information
info.text: Our support team will get back to you within one business day. For urgent issues, please use the phone number below.
